assertions.title: NDJSON streaming output works for search

steps.action: Created test file with 3 ERROR lines in temp dir

steps.expected: One JSON object per line, each independently parseable
steps.observed: 3 lines output, each a valid JSON object with keys: version, routing_backend, routing_reason, sidecar_used, query, path, file, line, text

steps.action: Parse each line independently with ConvertFrom-Json
steps.observed: All 3 lines parsed as valid JSON independently. No wrapping array or object.

steps.expected: Single JSON document with v1 contract fields
steps.observed: Single-line JSON document returned, parsed successfully as one object

steps.expected: Contains version, routing_backend, routing_reason, sidecar_used, total_matches, matches
steps.observed: All expected fields present: version=1, routing_backend=CpuBackend, routing_reason=cpu-native, total_matches=3, matches array with 3 entries

steps.action: Verify output is a single document (not NDJSON)
steps.expected: Output is 1 line / single parseable JSON document
steps.observed: Output was 1 line, single JSON parse succeeded. v1 contract preserved.
Exit code 2. Error: "the argument '--json' cannot be used with '--ndjson'"

steps.expected: Error: --ndjson not supported for tg run
steps.observed: Exit code 2. Error: "unexpected argument '--ndjson' found" with tip suggesting --json

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-WORK-005 confirmed NDJSON streaming emits one valid JSON per line. VAL-WORK-006 confirmed --json still returns a single JSON document with v1 fields. VAL-WORK-011 confirmed --json/--ndjson are mutually exclusive (exit code 2) and --ndjson is rejected for tg run.
